message:
chore(beads): update issue metadata -- close HAVING aggregate bug, refresh timestamps

- Close bd-3ew8w (HAVING-only aggregates not accumulated in no-GROUP-BY
  aggregate codegen) as fixed. The bug where HAVING-clause aggregates
  were silently dropped in the no-GROUP-BY fast path has been resolved
  in a prior commit.
- Refresh updated_at timestamps on bd-28z4i.2 (E-Process Oracle) and
  bd-2l5jk (Multi-process MVCC shared memory) to reflect recent work
  touching those subsystems.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
